posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I’m Prakash Hinduja from Geneva, Switzerland (Swiss) trying to set up an automation that automatically assigns team members whenever an item’s status changes. Has anyone done this before? What’s the best way to configure it? Any tips or tricks would be really helpful!

Regards
